# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure VMs with public IP addresses for direct access. Assign public IPs to each VM so developers can RDP/SSH directly without setting up a Bastion host or VPN. This simplifies our development environment setup.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

$schema: "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#"
contentVersion: "1.0.0.0"
parameters:
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[resourceGroup().location]"
  vmNamePrefix:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "devVM"
  adminUsername:
    type: string
  adminPassword:
    type: securestring
  vmCount:
    type: int
    defaultValue: 2
resources:
  - type: "Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses"
    apiVersion: "2020-11-01"
    name: "[concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), copyIndex(1), 'PublicIP')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    sku:
      name: "Basic"
      tier: "Regional"
    properties:
      publicIPAllocationMethod: "Dynamic"
    copy:
      name: "publicIPAddressCopy"
      count: "[parameters('vmCount')]"
  - type: "Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces"
    apiVersion: "2020-11-01"
    name: "[concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), copyIndex(1), 'NIC')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[concat('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses/', concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), copyIndex(1), 'PublicIP')] )]"
    properties:
      ipConfigurations:
        - name: "ipconfig1"
          properties:
            subnet:
              id: "[concat(variables('vnetId'), '/subnets/default')]" 
            publicIPAddress:
              id: "[concat(variables('publicIPPrefix'), concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), copyIndex(1), 'PublicIP')] )]"
    copy:
      name: "networkInterfaceCopy"
      count: "[parameters('vmCount')]"
  - type: "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines"
    apiVersion: "2021-03-01"
    name: "[concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), copyIndex(1)]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[concat('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces/', concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), copyIndex(1), 'NIC')] )]"
    properties:
      hardwareProfile:
        vmSize: "Standard_DS1_v2"
      osProfile:
        computerName: "[concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), copyIndex(1)]"
        adminUsername: "[parameters('adminUsername')]"
        adminPassword: "[parameters('adminPassword')]"
      storageProfile:
        imageReference:
          publisher: "MicrosoftWindowsServer"
          offer: "WindowsServer"
          sku: "2019-Datacenter"
          version: "latest"
      networkProfile:
        networkInterfaces:
          - id: "[concat(variables('nicPrefix'), concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), copyIndex(1), 'NIC')] )]"
    copy:
      name: "virtualMachineCopy"
      count: "[parameters('vmCount')]"
variables:
  vnetId: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', 'yourVNetName')]"
  publicIPPrefix: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), copyIndex(1), 'PublicIP')] )"
  nicPrefix: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), copyIndex(1), 'NIC')] )"
